tools.title: Virtual Staging AI
tools.description: AI-powered virtual staging for empty rooms. Upload photo → get staged versions in 30 sec. Pay per image. MLS-compliant output.
tools.shortDescription: Instant virtual staging for empty rooms. $5/image.

tools.title: Restb.ai
tools.description: Computer vision AI that analyzes property photos to auto-generate listing descriptions, extract features, and score photo quality.
tools.shortDescription: Auto-generate listing descriptions from photos. Free tier available.

tools.title: Ylopo
tools.description: AI-powered digital marketing platform for real estate. Facebook/Google ads, landing pages, CRM integration, and predictive lead scoring.
tools.shortDescription: All-in-one AI marketing: ads, lead gen, predictive scoring.

tools.title: Structurely
tools.description: AI conversational assistant (Aisa Holmes) that engages leads via text/email, qualifies them, and books appointments 24/7.
tools.shortDescription: AI assistant that qualifies leads & books appointments 24/7.

tools.title: HouseCanary
tools.description: AI-powered property valuation, market forecasts, and investment analytics. Used by top brokerages and institutional investors.
tools.shortDescription: Institutional-grade valuations & market forecasts.

tools.title: BrightMLS AI
tools.description: MLS-integrated AI tools for pricing recommendations, market trends, and buyer/seller reports. Included with Bright MLS subscription.
tools.shortDescription: MLS-integrated pricing AI & market reports.

tools.title: Sidekick
tools.description: AI CRM assistant that automates follow-ups, writes emails, schedules tasks, and predicts which contacts need attention.
tools.shortDescription: AI CRM assistant: follow-ups, emails, task scheduling.

tools.title: Follow Up Boss
tools.description: Popular CRM with AI-powered action plans, smart lists, and automated communication workflows. Built for real estate teams.
tools.shortDescription: CRM with AI action plans & smart automation.

tools.title: ChatGPT for Real Estate
tools.description: Custom GPTs and prompts for listing descriptions, emails, social media, market reports, and client communications. Requires ChatGPT Plus.
tools.shortDescription: AI writing assistant for all real estate content.

tools.title: Zapier AI
tools.description: Automation platform with AI-powered workflows. Connect 6000+ apps, use AI to build zaps, parse documents, and extract data from emails.
tools.shortDescription: AI-powered automation across 6000+ apps.

tools.title: Canva Magic Studio
tools.description: AI design tools for social media, listing presentations, flyers, and marketing materials. Magic Write, Magic Design, Magic Edit included.
tools.shortDescription: AI design suite for real estate marketing assets.

tools.title: Predis.ai
tools.description: AI social media content generator for real estate. Creates posts, carousels, videos, and hashtags from a single prompt. Schedules directly to platforms.
tools.shortDescription: Generate & schedule RE social content from one prompt.

tools.title: Matterport
tools.description: 3D virtual tour platform with AI-powered dollhouse views, measurement tools, and schematic floor plans. Industry standard for immersive listings.
tools.shortDescription: 3D virtual tours with AI dollhouse & floor plans.

tools.title: Asteroom
tools.description: Affordable 3D virtual tours using smartphone or 360 camera. AI stitching, floor plans, and MLS-compliant output. No subscription required.
tools.shortDescription: Low-cost 3D tours from smartphone. Pay per tour.

tools.title: DealCheck
tools.description: Real estate investment analysis platform. AI-powered property analysis, cash flow projections, BRRRR calculator, and portfolio tracking.
tools.shortDescription: Investment analysis: cash flow, BRRRR, portfolio tracking.

tools.title: RealNex
tools.description: Commercial real estate platform with AI-powered deal analysis, market data, comps, and client management. Built for CRE brokers and investors.
tools.shortDescription: CRE deal analysis, comps & market data platform.

tools.title: DocuSign AI
tools.description: E-signature platform with AI-powered agreement analysis, risk scoring, and automated compliance checks. Integrates with major real estate platforms.
tools.shortDescription: E-signatures + AI agreement analysis & compliance.

tools.title: SkySlope
tools.description: Transaction management platform with AI-powered compliance review, document audit, and brokerage oversight tools. Popular with brokerages.
tools.shortDescription: Transaction mgmt + AI compliance for brokerages.

tools.title: Offrs
tools.description: Predictive analytics platform that identifies homeowners likely to sell in the next 6-12 months. Smart data for targeted farming and lead generation.
tools.shortDescription: Predictive analytics: find likely sellers before they list.

tools.title: Revaluate
tools.description: AI-powered mover prediction that scores contacts by likelihood to move. Helps agents prioritize outreach to past clients and sphere of influence.
tools.shortDescription: Predict which contacts will move next. Prioritize outreach.

tools.title: Placester
tools.description: All-in-one real estate platform with AI-powered website builder, IDX/MLS integration, CRM, email marketing, and AI copywriter for blog posts and listing descriptions.
tools.shortDescription: AI website builder + CRM + marketing hub for agents.

tools.title: CINC
tools.description: AI-driven lead generation and CRM platform for real estate agents and teams. Automated lead capture, personalized follow-ups, home valuation landing pages, and referral network.
tools.shortDescription: Lead gen platform with AI conversations & seller landing pages.

tools.title: Lofty
tools.description: AI-powered CRM automation platform for real estate. AI Copilot captures and qualifies leads 24/7, automated follow-ups, smart plans, property alerts, and transaction management.
tools.shortDescription: AI CRM with 24/7 lead capture, qualification & nurturing.

tools.title: Alli AI
tools.description: AI-powered SEO automation platform for real estate websites. Automated meta tags, bulk editing, mobile optimization, site speed optimization, and real-time SEO deployment.
tools.shortDescription: Automate on-page SEO for real estate websites.

tools.title: Real Grader
tools.description: AI social media platform for real estate. Automated content creation, AI-generated captions and hashtags, scheduled posting, digital business cards (InstaCard), and reputation management.
tools.shortDescription: AI social media content, scheduling & reputation for agents.

tools.title: Mashvisor
tools.description: AI-powered real estate market analysis platform. Investment property analytics, rental income projections, occupancy tracking, neighborhood heatmaps, and Airbnb performance estimates.
tools.shortDescription: Market analysis: rental projections, heatmaps, ROI calculators.

tools.title: Birdeye
tools.description: AI-powered reputation management platform. Automated review requests, sentiment analysis, centralized review dashboard, social media integration, and multi-location support for brokerages.
tools.shortDescription: Automated reviews, sentiment analysis & reputation monitoring.

tools.title: Remini
tools.description: AI photo enhancer for property photos. Upscales images, reduces noise, sharpens details, fixes lighting/color, and restores faces/objects. Batch editing for MLS-ready listing photos.
tools.shortDescription: AI photo enhancement for MLS-ready listing images.

tools.title: Collov AI
tools.description: AI virtual staging and interior design platform. Upload empty room photos → get staged designs in seconds. Multiple style options, furniture replacement, and design visualization for listings.
tools.shortDescription: AI virtual staging with multiple styles & furniture replacement.
